title: Special Effects Artists and Animators
description: Create special effects or animations using film, video, computers, or other electronic tools and media for use in products, such as computer games, movies, music videos, and commercials.

tasks.text: Design complex graphics and animation, using independent judgment, creativity, and computer equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Create basic designs, drawings, and illustrations for product labels, cartons, direct mail, or television.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in design and production of multimedia campaigns, handling budgeting and scheduling, and assisting with such responsibilities as production coordination, background design, and progress tracking.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Create two-dimensional and three-dimensional images depicting objects in motion or illustrating a process, using computer animation or modeling programs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Make objects or characters appear lifelike by manipulating light, color, texture, shadow, and transparency, or manipulating static images to give the illusion of motion.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply story development, directing, cinematography, and editing to animation to create storyboards that show the flow of the animation and map out key scenes and characters.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Implement and maintain configuration control systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Script, plan, and create animated narrative sequences under tight deadlines, using computer software and hand drawing techniques.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop briefings, brochures, multimedia presentations, web pages, promotional products, technical illustrations, and computer artwork for use in products, technical manuals, literature, newsletters, and slide shows.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assemble, typeset, scan, and produce digital camera-ready art or film negatives and printer's proofs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Convert real objects to animated objects through modeling, using techniques such as optical scanning.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Create pen-and-paper images to be scanned, edited, colored, textured, or animated by computer.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Use models to simulate the behavior of animated objects in the finished sequence.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
